description: Material Passport for Stage 1.8 — Exploratory Causal Analysis. Tracks artifacts from data-driven causal discovery, confounding identification, and hypothesis generation.

required_artifacts.name: 关联结构报告
required_artifacts.description: Correlation matrix, conditional independence tests, and cluster analysis of variable relationships.

required_artifacts.name: 因果图 (DAG)
required_artifacts.description: Data-driven DAG generated via PC/FCI algorithm showing potential causal relationships.

required_artifacts.name: 混杂分析报告
required_artifacts.description: Identification of potential confounders, mediators, and colliders based on conditional independence tests.

required_artifacts.name: 假设候选列表
required_artifacts.description: Ranked list of research hypotheses with FINER feasibility assessment.

required_artifacts.name: 敏感性分析报告
required_artifacts.description: Sensitivity of causal discovery results to different algorithm parameters and assumptions.

optional_artifacts.name: EDA可视化
optional_artifacts.description: Distribution plots, correlation heatmaps, and DAG visualization images.

optional_artifacts.name: 文献种子
optional_artifacts.description: Initial literature references supporting the discovered causal hypotheses.

quality_gates.name: 因果发现算法参数合理性
quality_gates.description: PC/FCI algorithm parameters (alpha, max condition set size) are appropriate for sample size.

quality_gates.name: 假设可验证性
quality_gates.description: All generated hypotheses are testable with the available data.

quality_gates.name: 探索-确证隔离
quality_gates.description: If same data is used for exploration, confirmation analysis plan accounts for this (e.g., cross-validation, holdout).
